author: converted
install_msg:
Thanks for installing TCG Tracker!

Set your Best Buy API key first (free at developer.bestbuy.com):
  `[p]tcgset bestbuy_key <your_key>`

Then set your alert channel and role:
  `[p]tcgset channel #channel`
  `[p]tcgset role @role`

Add products with:
  `[p]tcgadd <upc> <msrp> <product name>`

Optionally add ZIP codes for in-store checks:
  `[p]tcgset zip <zip>`
name: TCGTracker
short: Track Pokémon TCG product drops at Best Buy by UPC.
description: Monitors Pokémon TCG products by UPC at Best Buy using their official API. Alerts a Discord channel with a role ping when a product is found in stock, showing price vs MSRP. Supports in-store inventory checks by ZIP code. Alerts fire once per restock cycle to prevent spam.
